{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's cTrader?" %}

{% trans 'cTrader is a widely used trading platform that offers a robust trading environment for both beginners and experienced traders. It provides:' %}

  • {% trans 'Advanced charting and analysis tools' %}
  • {% trans 'Automated trading capabilities' %}
  • {% trans 'Secure and reliable execution' %}
  • {% trans 'Extensive broker support' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade in cTrader?' %}

{% trans 'With cTrader, you can trade a wide range of financial instruments depending on your broker, including:' %}

  • {% trans 'Forex' %}: {% trans 'Major, minor, and exotic currency pairs.' %}
  • {% trans 'Commodities' %}: {% trans 'Gold, silver, oil, and other commodities.' %}
  • {% trans 'Indices' %}: {% trans 'Popular stock market indices such as S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX, and more.' %}
  • {% trans 'Cryptocurrencies' %}: {% trans 'Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies (availability depends on broker).' %}
  • {% trans 'CFDs' %}: {% trans 'Contracts for Difference for various markets offered by your broker.' %}

{% trans 'Note: The availability of instruments may vary depending on your chosen broker and account type (demo or live).' %}

{% trans 'cTrader credentials' %}

{% trans 'Follow the steps below to get your cTrader credentials.' %}

1 {% trans 'Choose a cTrader Broker' %}

{% trans 'To get started with cTrader, choose one of the brokers that support it:' %}

{% trans 'Here are some brokers that support cTrader:' %}

  • FXPro
  • ICMarkets
  • Pepperstone

{% trans 'To see all brokers supporting cTrader, visit the' %} {% trans 'cTrader Brokers List' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Create a cTrader Account' %}

  1. {% trans 'If you don’t already have a cTrader account, visit the website of your chosen broker from the list above.' %}
  2. {% trans 'Create an account or log in if you already have one.' %}
  3. {% trans "Open a cTrader trading account (demo or live) from the broker's dashboard." %}

3 {% trans 'Get Your cTrader Authentication Token' %}

  1. {% trans "Get your cTrader authentication token" %} {% trans "or by clicking on Get Token from our automate dashboard when you're adding a cTrader account." %}
  2. {% trans 'From your accounts list select only one account to generate the authentication token for it. If select multiple accounts, the token will be generated for the first one only.' %}
  3. {% trans 'Click on "Allow access" to generate your authentication token.' %}
  4. {% trans 'Copy the generated authentication token.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your authentication token, return to our platform's Automate section to link your cTrader account. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}
